explanation: This command simulates the use of ssh.exe to connect to a remote host on port 3389, which aligns with the Sigma rule's detection of RDP tunneling via SSH.
Reordered arguments to test if the Sigma rule detects the same behavior regardless of argument order.
Used an alternative syntax (-oPort) to specify the port, testing if the Sigma rule detects different command-line formats.
Omitted optional arguments while preserving the core behavior of connecting to port 3389.
Used an environment variable to represent the port number, testing if the Sigma rule can detect encoded or dynamic values.
